concerns.text: FR-003 mandates execution of three tasks (Summarization, Bug Detection, Code Completion). The plan restricts scope to Summarization, but tasks.md contains NO tasks for Bug Detection or Code Completion. This leaves the spec requirement unimplemented without a formal spec amendment or explicit exclusion in the tasks.

FR-004 mandates calculation of 'Execution Pass Rate' and 'substring match for bug detection'. Tasks only implement BLEU-4/ROUGE-L for Summarization (T024). No tasks exist to implement the metrics required for the Bug Detection and Code Completion tasks specified in FR-004.

User Story 2 explicitly requires executing 'three distinct tasks (Summarization, Bug Detection, Code Completion)'. Tasks.md Phase 4 only implements Summarization. The acceptance scenarios for Bug Detection (Scenario 2) and Code Completion (Scenario 3) have no corresponding implementation tasks.

Plan Constitution Check VII mandates a 'Binning Strategy' defining Low/Medium/High tertiles for stratification. Tasks.md contains no task to implement this stratification logic or record binning boundaries in metadata, creating a gap between the plan's statistical rigor requirement and implementation.

Task T020 description instructs loading 'codellama/CodeLlama-7b-Instruct-hf' (matching spec) but the comment notes the plan uses 'Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct'. This stale reference to the spec's model contradicts the plan's scope change and should be updated to reflect the actual implementation target to avoid confusion.
